zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißen於1060年出生在德國尼德薩辛布勞恩史維布勞恩史維時，她的父親Ekbert I. von Braunschweig Markgraf von Meißen24歲，母親Immilla di Torino40歲。她於1086年與Heinrich 'der Fette' Graf von Northeim在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 諾特海姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1117年12月9日在德國尼德薩辛艾姆登艾姆登享年57歲，埋葬在德國尼德薩辛布勞恩史維布勞恩史維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißen于1060年出生在德国尼德薩辛布勞恩史維布勞恩史維时，她的父亲Ekbert I. von Braunschweig Markgraf von Meißen24岁，母亲Immilla di Torino40岁。她于1086年与Heinrich 'der Fette' Graf von Northeim在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 諾特海姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1117年12月9日在德国尼德薩辛艾姆登艾姆登享年57岁，埋葬在德国尼德薩辛布勞恩史維布勞恩史維。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Braunschweig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Heinz, Juergen, Kurt, Otto, Reinhold.

German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic): habitational name from the city of Braunschweig in Lower Saxony, known in English as Brunswick. The placename is from the genitive case of the ancient Germanic personal name Bruno (borne by the Duke of Saxony who founded the city in 861) + Old Saxon wīk ‘dwelling place’, ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Gertrud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraud
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraut
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

nameMeanings.name: 'die
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

nameMeanings.name: Jüngere'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Junger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Jacques, Pascal, Sylvain.  German Kurt, Wolfang.  Scandinavian Anders.

German (also Jünger): distinguishing name, from Middle High German jünger ‘younger’, for the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, usually a son who bore the same name as his father. The surname Junger is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Slovenia, and elsewhere in central Europe.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): descriptive nickname from Middle High German junger, German Junger ‘young man’.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißen was born in 1060, in Braunschweig, Brunswick, Lower Saxony, Germany, her father, Ekbert I. von Braunschweig Markgraf von Meißen, was 24 and her mother, Immilla di Torino, was 40. She married Heinrich 'der Fette' Graf von Northeim in 1086, in Northeim, Lower Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 9 December 1117, in Emden, Emden, Lower Saxony, Germany, at the age of 57, and was buried in Braunschweig, Brunswick, Lower Saxony, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißen est née en 1060, à Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, son père, Ekbert I. von Braunschweig Markgraf von Meißen, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Immilla di Torino, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Heinrich 'der Fette' Graf von Northeim en 1086, à Landkreis Northeim, Niedersachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 décembre 1117, à Emden, Emden, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißen 1060 in Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ekbert I. von Braunschweig Markgraf von Meißen 24 und ihre Mutter Immilla di Torino 40. Sie hat 1086 in Landkreis Northeim, Niedersachsen, Deutschland Heinrich 'der Fette' Graf von Northeim geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Dezember 1117 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Emden, Emden, Niedersachsen, Deutschland und wurde in Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißen è nata il nel 1060 nel Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Germania, sua padre, Ekbert I. von Braunschweig Markgraf von Meißen, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Immilla di Torino, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Heinrich 'der Fette' Graf von Northeim nel 1086, nel Landkreis Northeim, Niedersachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 dicembre 1117, nel Emden, Emden, Niedersachsen, Germania, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißenが1060年にドイツニーダーサチセンブラウンスチウエイグブラウンスチウエイグで生まれた時，父Ekbert I. von Braunschweig Markgraf von Meißenは24歳，母Immilla di Torinoは40歳であった。1086年にドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス ノースエイムでHeinrich 'der Fette' Graf von Northeimと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1117年12月9日にドイツニーダーサチセンエムデンエムデンで57歳で死去し，ドイツニーダーサチセンブラウンスチウエイグブラウンスチウエイグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißen(이)가 1060년 독일 니더작센 브라슈위그 브라슈위그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ekbert I. von Braunschweig Markgraf von Meißen(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Immilla di Torino(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1086년 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 노르테임에서 Heinrich 'der Fette' Graf von Northeim(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1117년 12월 9일 독일 니더작센 든 든에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 니더작센 브라슈위그 브라슈위그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißen nasceu em 1060, em Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Ekbert I. von Braunschweig Markgraf von Meißen, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Immilla di Torino, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Heinrich 'der Fette' Graf von Northeim em 1086, em Landkreis Northeim, Niedersachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de dezembro de 1117, em Emden, Emden, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißen родилась в 1060 г. в местности браунщвиг, браунщвиг, ниедирсачсен, Германия, её отцу по имени Ekbert I. von Braunschweig Markgraf von Meißen было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Immilla di Torino, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Heinrich 'der Fette' Graf von Northeim в 1086 г. в местности ландкрис нортим, ниедирсачсен, Германия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 9 декабря 1117 г. в местности эмден, эмден, ниедирсачсен, Германия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности браунщвиг, браунщвиг, ниедирсачсен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gertrud 'die Jüngere' von Braunschweig Markgräfin von Meißen nació en 1060, en Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Alemania, su papá, Ekbert I. von Braunschweig Markgraf von Meißen, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Immilla di Torino, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Heinrich 'der Fette' Graf von Northeim en 1086, en Landkreis Northeim, Niedersachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 9 de diciembre de 1117, en Emden, Emden, Niedersachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Braunschweig, Braunschweig, Niedersachsen, Alemania.
